title: dactylorhiza × genevensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × genevensis, also known as the Geneva Spotted Orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that is a cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Dactylorhiza fuchsii. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × genevensis may include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza × genevensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
